prompt_task: I have bulk ATAC-seq counts lying around from axolotl organs (sample.swap.atac.q1.tsv.gz). Since the genome is large, I broke down standard AmexG_v6.0-DD chromosomes into smaller chunks (sample.swap.atac.q1.chrom.sizes). I'm not sure, but I suspect there is a sample swap. Can you check if that is the case? If there isn't, respond "None". Else respond with the names of the two cell types that have been swapped in case-sensitive lexicographic order, e.g. "Brain,GallBladder". Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
